title: 638 Contract with the U.S. Department of the Interior
summary: Ahtna, Incorporated is pleased to announce that in 2019 it renewed its 638 Contract with the U.S. Department of the Interior. The current renewal extends the contract until 2023. Ahtna takes pride in its ability to provide services in a government-to-government relationship with the Interior Departm...

title: USDA Forecasts U.S. Corn and Soybean Production Down from 2018
summary: The Crop Production report issued today by USDA’s National Agricultural Statistics Service (NASS) forecasted soybean and corn production down from 2018. Soybean production is down 19 percent from 2018, forecast at 3.68 billion bushels; corn growers are expected to decrease their production 4 percent...
